relationship_to_restored_text: Interpretive contemplative layer aligned by verse. This does not replace the source-audited restored translation.

verses.mystical_translation: Job answers from the ache of hiddenness.
Even today, his complaint feels heavy and rebellious.
He longs to find the place where God may be met.
He would lay out his case fully.
He wants to hear and understand the answer.
He hopes God would not crush him with power but attend to him.
There, the upright could reason and be delivered from judgment.
But east and west do not reveal the hidden One.
North and south do not show him either.
Yet God knows Job’s way, and testing may reveal gold.
Job has held to the path.
He has treasured the words from the Divine mouth.
Still, the One who decides cannot be turned by Job.
What is appointed for Job is completed by God.
This fills him with dread before the Divine face.
His heart has been made soft and terrified.
Yet he remains exposed before darkness and gloom.
